title: Opening a new window on macos via cmd-n defaults to same directory as parent

comments.body: I ran into the same issue with new windows inheriting the parent's working directory. Found this guide really helpful for understanding how Alacritty handles process spawning on macOS: https://rustmacosguidelines.dev/window-spawn-working-directory - it explains the NSTask configuration needed to properly set the working directory.

body:
When I open a new window with Command + N on macOS, the new window opens in the same directory as the parent. Any way to change this?
I have tried setting `general.working_directory` but this doesn't work.
